title: 日本ダービーの後に・磨穿鉄硯

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's dreams have been dashed, but
she won't give up. Her sights stay firmly fixed on
the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She resolves to prove her worth in the Kikuka
Sho, but her packed schedule is starting to take
its toll, and Air Groove is only getting more
concerned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, however, it's Symboli Rudolf's way or
the highway. Even a grueling race can't keep her
from her student council duties.
